case_title: S.F.MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU VS HAMILTON WEST NORMAN JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,171.25 FILED BY S.F.MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON WEST NORMAN JR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-14-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HAMILTON WEST NORMAN JR.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF S.F.MUNI RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FCU RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAMILTON WEST NORMAN JR. $2,171.25 PRINCIPAL, $74.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,245.25, S.F.
